tasks.instruction: Find short cat jokes rated at least 4.5 stars and add 4 of them under 120 characters to your favorites.

target_names: My cat sits on my laptop to keep me from going to work. It's called job security.
I asked my cat what nine plus nine is. She said nothing, just stared. Classic silent treatment.
Why don't cats play poker in the jungle? Too many cheetahs and not enough paws.
My cat's favorite key is paws; she walks across the keyboard and hits pause on everything.

tasks.instruction: Create a 'Knock Knock Set' collection and add 6 different knock-knock jokes to it, choosing jokes from at least two different pages of results.

target_names: Toc, toc. ¿Quién es? Lunes. ¿Lunes quién? Lunes otra vez, ya se acabó el fin de semana.
Knock, knock. Who's there? Cow says. Cow says who? No, cow says mooooo.
Knock, knock. Who's there? Birthday. Birthday who? Birthday you glad I brought cake?
Knock, knock. Who's there? Weekend. Weekend who? Weekend all agree Monday came too soon.
Knock, knock. Who's there? Control freak. Now you say, control freak who?
Knock, knock. Who's there? Interrupting NSFW joke... you know what, let's keep this one off the work projector.
